heading: Family and domestic violence: data collection and reporting
label: 41304 Family and domestic violence: data collection and reporting
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified as a note under , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 534 of Title 28

children.text: the age of the victim; and
the relationship of the victim to the offender, for crimes of murder, aggravated assault, simple assault, rape, sexual offenses, and offenses against children.

children.heading: National Crime Survey
children.label: b National Crime Survey
children.text: The Director of the Bureau of Justice Statistics, through the annual National Crime Survey, shall collect and publish data that more accurately measures the extent of domestic violence in America, especially the physical and sexual abuse of children and the elderly.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated in fiscal years 1989, 1990, 1991, and 1992, such sums as are necessary to carry out the purposes of this section.
